items.title: State of the Science: The epidemiology of posttraumatic stress disorder
items.description: Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a mental health condition with widespread effects on mental and physical health and mortality. In this paper, we present the current state of research on the epidemiology of PTSD, including its prevalence, risk factors, and impact.
